name: Four Corners
description_short: Unable to verify company details — website returns 403 Forbidden error, preventing access to service information, offerings, or business documentation.
description_long: Four Corners is listed in CreditDoc's payday-alternatives category, suggesting it may operate as a credit union PAL program, CDFI lender, employer advance platform, or similar alternative lending service designed to serve borrowers seeking sub-36% APR loans. However, the company's primary website (visitfourcorners.com) is currently inaccessible, returning a 403 Forbidden error that blocks all attempts to retrieve operational details, service descriptions, lending terms, rates, fees, or eligibility requirements. Without access to official company materials, it is impossible to verify the accuracy of the current categorization, confirm what specific products or services Four Corners provides, determine whether it remains actively operational, or assess the legitimacy and scope of its consumer finance offerings. The website access restriction may indicate the site is under maintenance, has been taken offline, or has implemented IP-based blocking that prevents public access. This presents a significant challenge for consumer research, as potential borrowers cannot independently review terms, apply for services, or verify the company's credentials through its stated online presence. Any profile information would be speculative without verified source material.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)

typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
